sigdevs.headline: Visa Inc AnnounceS Strategic Collaboration With OpenAI
sigdevs.description: June 10 (Reuters) - Visa Inc <V.N>::VISA INC -  ANNOUNCED A STRATEGIC COLLABORATION WITH OPENAI.VISA INC - AS PART OF THE PARTNERSHIP, VISA’S PAYMENT CAPABILITIES WILL BE INTEGRATED INTO OPENAI EXPERIENCES.VISA: UNDER PARTNERSHIP, TO PROVIDE ITS GLOBAL NETWORK, CREDENTIALING CAPABILITIES  SECURITY INFRASTRUCTURE TO SUPPORT AGENTIC COMMERCE EXPERIENCES.

sigdevs.headline: Visa & Brale Explore Private Stablecoin Settlement For Institutional Payments

sigdevs.headline: UK's PSR Plans To Consult On UK Profitability Reporting For Mastercard & Visa
sigdevs.description: May 21 (Reuters) - UK's PSR::UK'S PSR : TO CONSULT ON UK PROFITABILITY REPORTING FOR MASTERCARD AND VISA.PSR: IN ITS REVIEW OF CARD SCHEME  PROCESSING FEES, PSR FOUND EVIDENCE THAT SCHEMES' PROFIT MARGINS ARE HIGHER THAN EXPECTED IN COMPETITIVE MARKETS.UK'S PSR: DECIDED TO REQUIRE MASTERCARD  VISA TO PROVIDE PROFIT AND LOSS ACCOUNT FOR THEIR UK CARD OPERATIONS, WITH RELEVANT LEVELS OF DISAGGREGATION.PSR: DECIDED TO REQUIRE SCHEMES TO PROVIDE CONTEXTUAL INFORMATION TO HELP UNDERSTAND FINANCIAL PE

sigdevs.headline: Uber Adds To Its Delivery Hero Stake At €12Bn Valuation - Ft
sigdevs.description: May 27 (Reuters) - :UBER ADDS TO ITS DELIVERY HERO STAKE AT €12BN VALUATION - FT.UBER ACQUIRED ASPEX MANAGEMENT’S 14.6 PER CENT STAKE IN DELIVERY HERO EARLIER THIS WEEK THROUGH - FT.UBER AGREED TO PAY SLIGHTLY BELOW €40 PER SHARE, VALUING DELIVERY HERO AT ABOUT €12BN - FT.AFTER THE ACQUISITION FROM ASPEX, UBER NOW HOLDS AN ECONOMIC INTEREST CLOSE TO 37 PER CENT- FT.

sigdevs.headline: Uber And Doordash Sound Out Investors For Delivery Hero Bid- FT
sigdevs.description: May 23 (Reuters) - :UBER AND DOORDASH SOUND OUT INVESTORS FOR DELIVERY HERO BID- FT.UBER AND DOORDASH HAVE BOTH ENGAGED IN DISCUSSIONS ABOUT ACQUIRING MULTIPLE INVESTORS’ STAKES IN DELIVERY HERO IN RECENT DAYS- FT.INVESTORS HAVE INDICATED THEY WOULD SEEK A PRICE ABOVE €40 PER SHARE FOR DELIVERY HERO- FT.DELIVERY HERO’S BOARD IS CONSIDERING A FULL SALE OR SERIES OF DEALS THAT WOULD SPIN OFF THE GROUP’S MIDDLE EAST AND KOREA DIVISIONS- FT.

sigdevs.headline: Constellation Brands Says Robert Hanson To Step Down As EVP & President, Wine & Spirits Division Effective February 29, 2024
sigdevs.description: Jan 4 (Reuters) - Constellation Brands Inc <STZ.N>::CONSTELLATION BRANDS ANNOUNCES WINE & SPIRITS LEADERSHIP TRANSITION.: ROBERT HANSON TO STEP DOWN AS EVP & PRESIDENT, WINE & SPIRITS DIVISION EFFECTIVE FEBRUARY 29, 2024.: COMPANY INITIATES SEARCH TO IDENTIFY NEW LEADER TO GUIDE NEXT PHASE OF GROWTH FOR ITS WINE & SPIRITS BUSINESS.: COMPANY HAS INITIATED A SEARCH TO IDENTIFY A SUCCESSOR.CONSTELLATION BRANDS - BILL NEWLANDS, PRESIDENT AND CEO, WILL ASSUME RESPONSIBILITIES AS INTERIM LEADER FOR CO
